006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
025
026/**
027 * JSON writer for JCS (RFC 8785) canonical output.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Extends {@link JsonWriter} with ECMAScript-compatible number serialization and JCS string
031 * escaping (control characters, lone surrogate validation).
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8785">RFC 8785 — JSON Canonicalization Scheme</a>
035 * </ul>
036 */
037@SuppressWarnings({
038   "resource" // Writer resource managed by calling code
039})
040public class JcsWriter extends JsonWriter {
041
042   /**
043    * Constructor.
044    *
045    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
046    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, tabs and spaces will be used in output.
047    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level.
048    * @param escapeSolidus If <jk>true</jk>, forward slashes should be escaped in the output.
049    * @param quoteChar The quote character to use (always <js>'"'</js> for JCS).
050    * @param simpleAttrs If <jk>true</jk>, JSON attributes will only be quoted when necessary.
051    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, strings will be trimmed before being serialized.
052    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver for resolving URIs to absolute or root-relative form.
053    */
054   @SuppressWarnings({
055      "java:S107" // Constructor requires 8 parameters for JSON writer configuration
056   })
057   protected JcsWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean escapeSolidus, char quoteChar, boolean simpleAttrs, boolean trimStrings, UriResolver uriResolver) {
058      super(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, escapeSolidus, quoteChar, simpleAttrs, trimStrings, uriResolver);
059   }
060
061   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
062   public JcsWriter append(Object value) {
063      if (value == null) {
064         w("null");
065         return this;
066      }
067      if (value instanceof Number n)
068         w(JcsSerializerSession.toEcmaNumber(n));
069      else
070         w(value.toString());
071      return this;
072   }
073
074   @Override /* Overridden from JsonWriter */
075   public JcsWriter stringValue(String s) {
076      if (s == null)
077         return this;
078      validateNoLoneSurrogates(s);
079      q();
080      for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
081         var c = s.charAt(i);
082         if (c == '"')
083            w('\\').w('"');
084         else if (c == '\\')
085            w('\\').w('\\');
086         else if (c == '\b')
087            w('\\').w('b');
088         else if (c == '\t')
089            w('\\').w('t');
090         else if (c == '\n')
091            w('\\').w('n');
092         else if (c == '\f')
093            w('\\').w('f');
094         else if (c == '\r')
095            w('\\').w('r');
096         else if (c >= 0 && c <= 0x1F)
097            w(String.format("\\u%04x", (int) c));
098         else
099            w(c);
100      }
101      q();
102      return this;
103   }
104
105   @SuppressWarnings({
106      "java:S127" // Loop counter i++ needed to skip low surrogate after high surrogate pair
107   })
108   private static void validateNoLoneSurrogates(String s) {
109      for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
110         var c = s.charAt(i);
111         if (Character.isHighSurrogate(c)) {
112            if (i + 1 >= s.length() || !Character.isLowSurrogate(s.charAt(i + 1)))
113               throw rex("Lone high surrogate at index {0} in string", i);
114            i++;
115         } else if (Character.isLowSurrogate(c)) {
116            throw rex("Lone low surrogate at index {0} in string", i);
117         }
118      }
119   }
120}
